Rythmos® Asset Tags

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Asset tracking
Movement alerts
Waterproof

Overview

Rythmos® Asset Tags are compact wireless tracking devices designed to monitor the location and movement of mobile equipment across a facility. They provide real-time visibility of critical assets such as wheelchairs, med carts, lifts, and medical devices.

FUNCTIONS

Provides real-time asset visibility
Tracks movable equipment across facility
Reduces search time for critical resources
IP67-rated for all environments

Key Capabilities

Real-Time
Tracking

Tracks
mobile assets in the community

Ultra-Thin
Design

Easy
placement on equipment

Flexible
Mounting

Supports
adhesive, screw, or bracket install

Long
Battery Life

Up
to 3 years of operation

Waterproof
Construction

IP67-rated
for medical and facility areas

Scalable
Deployment

Supports
large-scale mesh tracking

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 52.8 × 35.9 × 5.8 mm
Weight: 7.5 g (excluding battery)
Power Source: CR3032 coin cell battery
Battery Life: Up to 3 years average use
Mesh Technology: Wirepas Mesh 2.4 GHz
Wireless IC: Nordic nRF52832
Ingress Protection: IP67 waterproof/dustproof
Mounting: Adhesive, screws, or optional bracket
Firmware Updates: OTA (over-the-air)

System & Safety Features

Centralized asset visibility: Locate equipment through Care Manager platform

Workflow optimization: Reduces time spent searching for devices

Real-time status updates: Continuous reporting through mesh network

Wireless communication: Encrypted mesh networking for reliable operation

Facility-wide coverage: Supports dense indoor tracking deployments

Medical environment ready: Designed for hospitals, care communities, and clinics

System Topology — Asset Tags Deployment

Ideal for tracking high-value and frequently moved equipment such as wheelchairs, med carts, lifts, and medical devices across hospitals, senior living communities, and clinical care environments. Deploy throughout the facility to improve asset visibility, reduce search time, and support operational efficiency.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Mount directly on tracked equipment
- Ensure secure attachment to surface

Power

- CR3032 replaceable coin cell battery

Mounting

- Use adhesive, screws, or mounting bracket
- Optional colored plugs available for identification

Environment

- Indoor and wet-cleaning environments supported
- IP67-rated for dust and water protection

Maintenance

- Replace CR3032 battery as needed
- Inspect mounting stability periodically

Cleaning

- Can be wiped or washed down safely
- OTA updates supported

intrexis.com
